text:
Once upon an ancient time, in a land filled with towering forests and gentle streams, there lived a wise old owl named Olive. Olive had seen more centuries pass than there were grains of sand on the seashORE.

One foggy morning, she decided to head to the small village for some fresh berries. But alas, there were none ripe this season. Desperate, Olive flew westward to the mysterious Woods of Everlasting Nightshade—or so the villagers whispered.

Inside those shadows sprawled ancient trees so thick you couldn't see the sky. The air was thick with night-flower perfume and the quiet groans of trees that had lived centuries longer than anyone.

After a long pause, Olive heard something fluttering nearby. It was a tiny bat, starved for nutrition. She swooped down and offered it a berry.

The bat thanked her warmly. "You're kinder than any creature I've ever heard."

Olive chuckled. "Well, I guess I'm unusual around these
